# Bone

## Tags
health, skeleton, skull, death, pets, dog

## Categories
animals, medical, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/bone)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Bone;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Bone { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
